I want 10 weaknesses of Dell from 2023 and I want the 10 points to be similar to this:  
1. [Company] experienced a decline in revenue or profit from [year].  
2. [Company] saw a decrease in earnings or stock price from [year].  
3. [Company] faced a significant drop in stock value from [year] to [year].  
4. [Company] relies heavily on a single product or market.  
5. [Company] experienced an increase in liabilities from [year] to [year].  
6. [Company] produced less output or faced challenges due to reduced demand from [industry] due to [event].  
7. [Company] has no offerings in [specific area].  
8. [Company] depends on a small number of large customers.  
9. [Company] is facing legal or regulatory issues from [type of issue].  
10. [Company] is under scrutiny or facing challenges in [specific area].
